com.rscja.deviceapi

Class RFIDWithISO14443B

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithISO14443B
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IRFIDWithHFBase, IRFIDWithISO14443B

    public class RFIDWithISO14443B
extends java.lang.Object
implements IRFIDWithISO14443B
    高频14443B协议操作API

    注意事项:
    1. App工程需要导入jna-5.4.0.jar 和 jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    The App project needs to import jna-5.4.0.jar and jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    windows系统注意事项:
    2. 需要依赖,UHFAPI.dll，将这两个文件保存到程序根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的dll路径。
    2. Need to depend on, UHFAPI.dll, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the dll path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.
    Linux系统注意事项:
    2.需要依赖 libTagReader.so ，将这个文件保存到命令行根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的so路径
    2. Need to depend on, libTagReader.so, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the so path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.


    Example Usage:

      RFIDWithISO14443B rfid14443B = RFIDWithISO14443B.getInstance();
      rfid14443B.connect();
     
      byte[] data=rfid14443B.resetTypeB();
      if (data==null){
       //reset fail
       return;
      }
      byte[] result = rfid14443B.sendCommand(sendData);
      if (result == null) {
       //Send failure
       return;
      }
      rfid14443B.disconnect();

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static RFIDWithISO14443B getInstance()
        获取UHF操作实例
        Acquire UHF operation Instance
        Returns:
        RFIDWithISO14443B

      • connect

        public boolean connect()
        连接读写器(Connect to the reader)
        Specified by:
        connect in interface IRFIDWithHFBase
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • resetTypeB

        public byte[] resetTypeB()
        寻卡(Search card)
        Specified by:
        resetTypeB in interface IRFIDWithISO14443B
        Returns:
        success will return HF14443RequestEntity data, failure will return null.

      • getUidTypeB

        public byte[] getUidTypeB()
        获取卡片ID (Acquire card ID)
        Specified by:
        getUidTypeB in interface IRFIDWithISO14443B
        Returns:
        success will return HF14443RequestEntity data, failure will return null.

      • sendCommand

        public byte[] sendCommand(byte[] cmd)
        发送命令(send command)
        Specified by:
        sendCommand in interface IRFIDWithISO14443B
        Parameters:
        cmd - 命令数据
        Returns:
        success will return data, failure will return null.

      • disconnect

        public void disconnect()
        断开连接(disconnect)
        Specified by:
        disconnect in interface IRFIDWithHFBase

      • setDllOrSOFilePath

        public void setDllOrSOFilePath(java.lang.String directory,
                               java.lang.String fileName)
        设置加载的dll文件路径
        Parameters:
        directory - dll文件目录,如果文件目录为null，将采用可运行的jar文件执行路径
        fileName - dll文件名称，如果文件名为null，将使用默认文件名UHFAPI.dll 备注:如果需要使用此函数，请在调用init函数之前调用此函数。
